transcript: Customer: Hi, this is Carlos Mendez. I'm calling because my GFCI outlet is hot to the touch. Dispatcher: Hi Carlos, I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what brand it is? Customer: It's a Siemens, maybe 10 years old. Dispatcher: Okay, and what's the service address? Customer: 314 Birch Lane. Dispatcher: Got it. We can send a technician out today if possible. Does that work? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

expected_entities.issue: GFCI outlet is hot to the touch
expected_entities.equipment: Siemens GFCI outlet, maybe 10 years old
